title: T-036 — UI: TEC-080 Technical Dashboard landing page
prompt: Build /technical (root) page TEC-080 per §6A. KPI strip (Products / Active BOMs / Routings / Allergen Overrides / D365 Sync) + Recent Changes timeline + Quick Actions + D365 Sync Health card. Reuses shared `kpi_tile` primitive. Match prototype `tech_dashboard_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:370-429. RED tests/ui/tec-080-dashboard.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-080-dashboard.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Technical module landing page with KPIs + Recent Changes + Quick Actions + D365 Health.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component aggregates counts via SQL. Quick Actions button group navigates to TEC-011, TEC-022, TEC-070.
acceptance_criteria: Given the dashboard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:370-429, then KPI strip has 5 tiles in the prototype order, Recent Changes timeline below, Quick Actions row, D365 Health card on the right — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given counts query returns 0 for all KPIs, when rendered, then tiles still show '0' and the empty timeline copy.
Given user clicks the Quick Action 'Create item', when fired, then TEC-011 modal opens.
test_strategy: RED tests for tile structure + parity.
risk_red_lines: Do not block render on slow KPI query — use Suspense fallback.
